title: Cypress Hill & The London Symphony Orchestra: Black Sunday Live at Royal Albert Hall
original_title: Cypress Hill & the London Symphony Orchestra - Black Sunday Live at the Royal Albert Hall
overview: Hip-hop meets classical as the legendary Cypress Hill play an exclusive show at the Royal Albert Hall alongside the London Symphony Orchestra. Celebrating 30 years since the release of their seminal album Black Sunday, they are accompanied by unique arrangements from the glorious 70-piece orchestra.
